theme: mining dense veins inside a crystal lattice
title: Vein Harvest in a Crystal Lattice
strategies: trivial: submit the k shortest rows of the given (scrambled) basis -- reproduces the checker baseline
greedy: size-reduce the full basis (Babai rounding, no reordering) and take the k shortest independent rows

strong: for every candidate linear form a in (Z/p)^n, intersect the lattice with its index-p congruence sublattice {v : a.v == 0 mod p}, LLL-reduce that, and harvest the k shortest independent vectors across all candidates -- the one correct residue class exposes the planted dense vein
